item.title: Rules Subcommittee
item.description: Rules Subcommittee is scheduled for June 8, 2026 at 3:00 PM at Community Meeting Room, 501 Poli St., 2nd Floor, Ventura, CA 93001. The source did not provide additional background.

item.title: College Area Community Council
item.description: College Area Community Council is scheduled for May 27, 2026 at 7:00 PM at Ventura, CA 93002. The source listing provides the public with the time and location for the Ventura event.

item.title: Planning Commission Meeting Scheduled
item.description: Planning Commission Meeting is scheduled for May 27, 2026 at 5:30 PM at City Council Chambers, 501 Poli St., Ventura, CA 93001. The source did not provide additional background.

item.title: East Ventura Community Council
item.description: East Ventura Community Council is scheduled for May 21, 2026 at 7:00 PM at Ventura, CA 93002. The source listing provides the public with the time and location for the Ventura event.

item.title: City Council Meeting Scheduled
item.description: City Council Meeting is scheduled for May 19, 2026 at 5:00 PM at City Council Chambers, 501 Poli St., Ventura, CA 93001. The source listing provides the public with the time and location for the Ventura event.

item.title: Housing Rights Center (HRC) Office Hours Scheduled
item.description: Housing Rights Center (HRC) Office Hours is scheduled for May 19, 2026 at 9:30 AM at Tuesdays: Anacapa Conference Room from 9:30 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. Thursdays: Anacapa Conference Room from 9:30 a.m.

item.title: Water Commission Regular Meeting Scheduled
item.description: Water Commission Regular Meeting is scheduled for May 18, 2026 at 5:30 PM at Community Meeting Room, 501 Poli St., 2nd Floor, Ventura, CA 93001. The source listing provides the public with the time and location for the Ventura event.
